description: Raw SQL escape hatches across popular JS/TS DB drivers (pg, mysql2, TypeORM, Sequelize, Knex, Kysely, postgres.js, better-sqlite3) — interpolated input is SQL injection

patterns.label: node-postgres/pg: client/pool/conn.query with template-literal interpolation — SQL injection
mysql/mysql2 driver in use — verify all query() calls use placeholders, not concatenation
TypeORM repository/manager.query — raw SQL, must use parameter array not interpolation
TypeORM @Query with string concatenation — SQL injection
Sequelize sequelize.query with template-literal interpolation — pass replacements/bind instead
Sequelize.literal — bypasses escaping; must not include user input
Sequelize.fn with template-literal interpolation — SQL injection
Knex .raw with template-literal interpolation — SQL injection
Knex .whereRaw — verify bindings are passed as second argument, not interpolated
Knex .orderByRaw — verify bindings are passed as second argument, not interpolated
Knex .havingRaw — verify bindings are passed as second argument, not interpolated
Kysely sql.raw — bypasses parameterization, must not include user input
Kysely sql.lit — inserts literal SQL, must not include user input
postgres.js sql.unsafe — bypasses parameterization, must not include user input
better-sqlite3 db.prepare with template-literal interpolation — use bound parameters
better-sqlite3 db.exec with template-literal interpolation — db.exec cannot bind, refactor to prepare()
